title: BettorMC
description: Stake your world on games of chance
body:
BettorMC

Stake your world on games of chance!

BettorMC changes your world into a minigame where you must get enough money to pay rent. Two new characters are introduced as part of this: - **Savelord**: Gives you a tutorial when you first join your world then charges you rent for every day in your world. If you cannot afford your rent, they will evict you. - **Croupier**: Allows you to stake your money on the price of materials, craft-off tickets, and a handful of wagers. There will always be a croupier following you around, there is no escape! ⚠ **Do not play with this mod in worlds you intend to keep.**
